series_metadata.series_title: Final Denials/Revocations of Permit and Final Transfer Orders
series_metadata.series_description: Records include Letters of Denial, Letters of Revocation, Transfer Orders, Closure Orders, supporting documentation and correspondence use by the Division to make these determinations.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Keep five years unless licensee or permittee is involved in litigation with Division. In which case, keep two years all administrative ,civil, or criminal action is complete ; Paper: Keep five years unless licensee or permittee is involved in litigation with Division. In which case, keep two years all administrative ,civil, or criminal action is complete
